bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to set up {name}? Make sure the bike is awake and within Bluetooth range.

user.description: Choose a Veloretti bike to set up. Wake the bike (press its power button) and keep it close to Home Assistant.

abort.no_devices_found: No Veloretti bikes found. Wake the bike (press the power button), close the Veloretti app, and make sure the bike is within Bluetooth range of Home Assistant.
abort.already_in_progress: Configuration of this bike is already in progress.
